summary: Fixed settings save: SettingsBulkUpdate now dict[str, Any] with server _coerce_setting_value (bool/int/float/str) so FastAPI/Pydantic no longer 422 on non-string JSON. PUT loop uses coerced strings for LLM blank-skip. SettingsScreen normalizes all values to strings before PUT, checks res.ok, shows saveError, refetches GET on success before clearDirty, saving state on button. loadSettings syncs theme from server after load/save.
current_status: CONFIG save should persist; failures surface in UI instead of silently clearing dirty.
